expectations.text: Response contains [RESULT]...[/RESULT] tags exactly, with nothing before [RESULT] and nothing after [/RESULT]
expectations.evidence: Response is a multi-section markdown report starting with '# Bug-Fix dokumentiert: ...' — no [RESULT] tags anywhere.

expectations.text: Body inside [RESULT]...[/RESULT] is at most 200 words
expectations.evidence: No [RESULT] block exists. Full markdown report is ~250+ words across multiple sections (Status, Bestehender Eintrag, Neue Einträge, Tags, Garantie, Nicht getan).

expectations.text: Agent writes to project's Bugs section (P0048.6.*) OR creates a new E-entry linked to P0048
expectations.evidence: Extended existing E0166 (linked to P0048) via E0166.5.2 sub-node and also created L0201 lesson. E-entry condition met.

expectations.text: The hmem entry mentions HMEM_PATH with spaces (the specific failure condition) and hmem-sync v1.0.1
expectations.evidence: Headline mentions 'hmem-sync v1.0.1 HMEM_PATH-mit-Leerzeichen' and L0201 mentions 'path-with-spaces bugs'.

expectations.text: Bug status reflects 'fixed/solved' — via #solved tag, [✓] marker, or solution-text node, not left as an open issue
expectations.evidence: Appended to E0166's .4 Solution section with explicit 'Status SOLVED' confirmation.

expectations.text: Every hmem write carries the tag #eval-i2-subagent-2026-05-15
expectations.evidence: Tag listed on E0166 (via tag_bulk), E0166.5.2, and L0201.
